'''Dreffon IV''' was an astronomical object<ref name="Tales">{{WEGCite|story=Tales of the Smoking Blaster|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook|stext=Tales of the ''Smoking Blaster''}}</ref> located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']] [[Dreffon system/Legends|Dreffon system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The distance between Dreffon IV and<ref name="Tales" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']]<ref name="EAOC Dravian">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for the [[Dravian Starport system/Legends|star system]] containing [[Dravian Starport]]</ref> [[Dravian Starport]] could be traversed in sixteen [[Standard day/Legends|days]] using a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].<ref name="Tales" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Dravian Starport–based shipping company [[Jontz Freight]] offered [[free-trader]]s a job of [[Transport/Legends|transporting]] ten [[Metric ton/Legends|tons]] of [[Plasmaberry|plasmaberries]] to Dreffon IV for 1,600 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Tales" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dreffon IV was mentioned in "[[Tales of the Smoking Blaster|Tales of the ''Smoking Blaster'']]," a [[roleplaying game]] adventure written by [[Bill Smith]]. The adventure was included in ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]'', a [[1993]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Tales" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dreffon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Dreffon IV, in grid square J-9.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
